text.title: LLM-Friendly Architecture (Software Developer) — Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing `llm-friendly-architecture` applied from trigger to committed artefact.

example.title: Quarterly review of a billing-service refactor
example.note: Trigger fired; owner assigned; typed inputs gathered; decision authored; evidence anchored; review scheduled.

list.item: Step 1 — trigger captured from the recurring quarterly-review calendar entry; URL points to the GitHub issue.
Step 2 — owner resolved to `arch:alice` from the RACI; alice on-call this quarter.
Step 3 — inputs typed: scope is a service slug, window_days is int, prs_in_window is int.
Step 4 — decision is a single declarative sentence with a deadline.
Step 5 — evidence anchors point at the canonical PR, the perf dashboard, and the related Sentry issue.
Step 6 — review scheduled three months out; entry on alice's calendar.
